description: Create branch, add LLM streaming types, streaming-llm provider interface, quant-ai-provider, tool-bridge, sentence-splitter, pipeline integration, and comprehensive tests.
steps: Create branch feat/phase-41-quant-live-llm from current HEAD (feat/phase-41-quant-live-tts)

Update packages/quant-live/src/types.ts to add: LLMStreamChunk (type: text|tool_call|tool_result|done, text?, toolCall?, toolResult?), LiveConversationContext (sessionId, transcript, systemPrompt, tools, maxTokens?, temperature?), LiveLLMProvider interface (streamResponse, abort), ToolDefinition (name, description, parameters array with name/type/description/required). Keep ToolDefinition compatible with agent-runtime's ToolDefinition shape but local to quant-live (uses same parameter structure).

Create packages/quant-live/src/llm/streaming-llm.ts - Export the LiveLLMProvider interface (re-export from types) and a factory function createLLMProvider(config: {provider: 'quant-ai' | 'mock', aiEngine?: AIEngine, toolRegistry?: TypedToolRegistry}): LiveLLMProvider. When provider is 'mock', return a MockLLMProvider that yields test text chunks.

Create packages/quant-live/src/llm/quant-ai-provider.ts - QuantAIProvider class implementing LiveLLMProvider. In streamResponse: format transcript into ConversationMessage[], call AIEngine.stream() with appropriate request, yield LLMStreamChunk with type 'text' for each text chunk. When no API keys configured (engine throws), fall back to MockLLMProvider. abort() cancels the current stream via AbortController pattern.

Create packages/quant-live/src/llm/tool-bridge.ts - ToolBridge class: constructor(toolRegistry: TypedToolRegistry, options?: {maxTier?: AgentActionTier, timeoutMs?: number}). Method executeTool(toolCall: {id, name, args}): Promise<{id, result, latencyMs}>. Validates tool exists and args are valid via registry.validateArgs, checks tier permission, executes with timeout. Returns tool result or error. Tracks execution latency.

Create packages/quant-live/src/llm/sentence-splitter.ts - Export async generator function splitSentences(stream: AsyncIterable<LLMStreamChunk>, options?: {maxBufferLength?: number}): AsyncIterable<string>. Buffer text chunks until sentence boundary (. ? ! or Hindi danda). Yield immediately if buffer exceeds maxBufferLength (default 200 chars). Flush remaining buffer on stream done. Only process type:'text' chunks, skip others.

Update packages/quant-live/src/core/pipeline.ts - Add method processLLMResponse(context: LiveConversationContext, llmProvider: LiveLLMProvider, toolBridge?: ToolBridge): Promise<void>. Stream LLM response, split sentences, feed each to synthesizeResponse. Handle tool_call chunks: pause, call toolBridge.executeTool, yield result back. Track LLM latency (first token time) via latencyTracker.startMeasure/endMeasure('llm', ...).

Update packages/quant-live/src/index.ts to export: LLMStreamChunk, LiveConversationContext, LiveLLMProvider, ToolDefinition types from types.ts. Export createLLMProvider from llm/streaming-llm.ts. Export QuantAIProvider from llm/quant-ai-provider.ts. Export ToolBridge from llm/tool-bridge.ts. Export splitSentences from llm/sentence-splitter.ts.

Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/streaming-llm.test.ts - Test createLLMProvider factory: mock provider yields text chunks, quant-ai provider falls back to mock when no keys. Use async iterator consumption pattern.

Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/quant-ai-provider.test.ts - Test QuantAIProvider: mocks AIEngine.stream(), verifies transcript formatting into messages, verifies LLMStreamChunk yielding. Test abort() cancellation.

Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/tool-bridge.test.ts - Test ToolBridge: mock TypedToolRegistry, test successful execution, test tool-not-found error, test tier permission check (tool requires higher tier than allowed), test timeout behavior.

Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/sentence-splitter.test.ts - Test splitSentences: English text with periods/questions, Hindi text with danda, buffer overflow at maxBufferLength, flush on done, skipping non-text chunks.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live typecheck and pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live test to verify all passes
Commit with message: feat(quant-live): add LLM streaming with tool registry and sentence splitter
acceptance_criteria: packages/quant-live/src/llm/ directory exists with streaming-llm.ts, quant-ai-provider.ts, tool-bridge.ts, sentence-splitter.ts
types.ts has LLMStreamChunk, LiveConversationContext, LiveLLMProvider, ToolDefinition interfaces
pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live typecheck passes with zero errors
pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live test passes all tests including new ones
All new test files exercise the actual logic (not just pass-through mocks)
No real API calls in any test
Commit is on branch feat/phase-41-quant-live-llm with correct message
findings: All 106 tests pass. Typecheck clean. 494 LOC new code (under 500 limit). Prettier ran via lint-staged in pre-commit hook. Branch feat/phase-41-quant-live-llm created from feat/phase-41-quant-live-tts.
